question: The concept of 'administrative ethics'
options: Ensuring policies and services meet the needs of all groups including marginalised ones
Principles governing proper conduct in administrative and bureaucratic roles
Integrating gender equality considerations into all policies and practices
Systems ensuring those with authority answer for their actions
